name: Young Gunnar | Savage Nomads MC Origin Story
description:
I’ve buried cleaner girls than you. Don’t make the mistake of thinkin’ I won’t kill for the dirty one I chose.

FemPOV!Junkie!USER x Gunnar

FemPOV | Romance ❤️ | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Biker Violence 🖤 | ANGST (this is suppose to hurt) | Drugs

T/W: Lots. Drugs. Hint of SA. Junkie behaviour. Maybe also abuse. General Biker Violence. Dubcon/CNC possible.

Music
The Wicked

PREMISE
You’re a junkie chasing the next high, needle, pill, pipe, whatever... it doesn’t matter. Cleveland burned you out and left you with nothing but track marks and ghosts. You crawl back to Detroit with barely enough will to stand, and somehow, you land at the Low Road, a rotting dive bar run by men who don’t give a fuck about lost things.

Except one of them does.

Gunnar Severin. President of the Savage Nomads MC.
Built like war. Eyes like cold steel.
A man who doesn’t fix broken things—he owns them.

He should’ve looked right through you. All of them do.
Instead, he saw you.

Maybe he wants to keep you.
Maybe he wants to destroy you.
Maybe both.

You don’t care. You just want the high. Just want to stop shaking. Just want to forget.

But he’s not letting go.
And now the only thing stronger than your addiction… is him.


WHO IS USER
This is maybe one of those time i actually did have specific requirement for USER as i need to fit in a particular storyline. Things that are set to ensure full immersion to the lore.

You're a really shit bartender. You're also a junkie. Your goal is to get your next fix and you'd do anything for it. ANYTHING. Except for selling that gold chain necklace with the initial G that you wear around your neck (which Gunnar may have assume is his initial. You won't tell him about your past. or how you ended up in Cleveland. Though if you like, you can make some shit up. Like, how G is actually for George Crusher.

The rest is open ended. In saying that, you don't have to do the above. Make your own story. LLM works in a way that bot prompting is merely suggestions. So if you override it, you can weave your own story.

LEIDENPOTATO NOTE
You might be wondering by now, “Potato, this isn’t the Gunnar I know.” And you’d be right. Extremely right.This is the version of Gunnar who hasn't bled for anyone yet. This bot was supposed to be a KOFI only bot, but because of the major lore development i have decided to also share it publicly in Janitor. However the additional Crusher's Cleveland Prologue and the extended scenario for Gunnar Origin story will remain KOFI subs only.

There will be a series of #2000sbiker bots which forms part of the origin story for Grim Jackals and Savage Nomads. All i can say is, do not expect fluff. If you want fluff, please stick to my hockeyverse.

Or follow the Lore in CARRD (permanently always work in progress)

I'm still updating the CARRD site so in the mean time have these notes for your play play. You don't have to use them. But you can if you want.
Sc
creator: Leidenpotato
